events.title: 8th Grade Graduation Ceremony
events.location: Riverside Middle School Gymnasium, 200 Riverside Drive, San Jose, CA 95123
events.description:
Riverside Middle School Class of 2026 graduation ceremony. Date: Friday, June 12, 2026. Time: 6:00 PM. Location: Riverside Middle School Gymnasium (200 Riverside Drive, San Jose, CA 95123). Doors open at 5:30 PM; seating is first-come, first-served. Program:
- 6:00 PM - Processional
- 6:15 PM - Welcome & National Anthem
- 6:20 PM - Student Speeches
- 6:40 PM - Guest Speaker
- 7:00 PM - Diploma Presentation
- 7:45 PM - Closing Remarks
- 8:00 PM - Reception in Courtyard
Tickets: 4 tickets per family (distributed in May). Dress code: Semi-formal attire. Parking: School parking lot and street parking. Professional photos available for purchase. More details to follow from Principal Martinez.

events.title: Graduation — Doors Open
events.location: Riverside Middle School Gymnasium, 200 Riverside Drive, San Jose, CA 95123
events.description: Doors for the Class of 2026 graduation open at 5:30 PM. Seating is first-come, first-served. (Event related to the 6:00 PM graduation ceremony on June 12, 2026.)

events.title: Graduation Reception (Courtyard)
events.location: Riverside Middle School Courtyard, 200 Riverside Drive, San Jose, CA 95123
events.description: Reception following the graduation ceremony, beginning at 8:00 PM in the school courtyard. (No end time provided in the announcement.)
